div.class: rounded-circle bg-primary text-white d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3

span.t-att-class: 'bg-danger text-white' if _lvl >= 20 else ('bg-warning text-dark' if _lvl >= 10 else ('bg-info text-white' if _lvl >= 5 else 'bg-primary text-white'))

t.p: This user has not set up their profile yet.

div.class: card-header bg-primary text-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

t.p: No members yet — be the first!

div.class: mt-5 alert alert-light border small text-muted

div.div: 💡 Tip: Select any text in the Discuss window and click 📖 Add to Vocabulary to save words directly to your list. Click a username inside Discuss, then use View Profile to visit their Lexora profile.
